json-formatter.instructions: Paste your JSON text in the input area and click Format to beautify it.

base64.input_placeholder: Enter text to encode or Base64 string to decode...
base64.instructions: Enter text and click Encode to convert to Base64, or paste a Base64 string and click Decode to convert back. Toggle URL-safe mode for URL-compatible encoding.

word-counter.input_placeholder: Type or paste your text here...
word-counter.instructions: Type or paste your text to see real-time statistics.

url-encoder.input_placeholder: Enter text to encode or encoded string to decode...
url-encoder.instructions: Enter text and click Encode to URL-encode it, or paste an encoded string and click Decode. Choose between encodeURIComponent and encodeURI modes.

timestamp.instructions: Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates. The current timestamp updates in real-time.

json-minify.instructions: Paste JSON and click Minify to compress, Escape to escape special characters, or Unescape to reverse escaping.

uuid-generator.instructions: Generate UUID v4 identifiers. Choose quantity and format, then click Generate.

hash-calculator.instructions: Enter text and select hash algorithms. Results update in real-time.

color-converter.instructions: Pick a color or enter a HEX value to see all format conversions.

radix-converter.error_invalid: Invalid input for the selected base
radix-converter.instructions: Enter a number and select its base. All four base conversions are shown simultaneously.

case-converter.instructions: Enter text and select a conversion mode. The result updates in real-time.

password-generator.instructions: Configure password options and click Generate. Use the strength indicator to evaluate security.

json-sort.instructions: Paste a JSON object and click Sort to order keys alphabetically. Array order is preserved.

regex-tester.instructions: Enter a regex pattern and test text. Matches are highlighted in real-time. Toggle flags as needed.

qrcode.text_placeholder: Enter text or URL to encode...
qrcode.coming_soon: QR code generation requires a library. Coming soon!
qrcode.instructions: Enter text or a URL to generate a QR code. Customize size and colors.

errors.not_found_description: The page you are looking for does not exist.
errors.tool_error: An error occurred in this tool.
